title: Characterization of VPS13Cs Binding to GUVs
author: xinbo.wang
materials: Buffer (500 mM sucrose, 25 mM HEPES, pH 7.4)

steps.instruction: GUVs were generated as previously described. Generation of Giant Unilamellar Vesicles (GUVs) Using Polyacrylamide Gels.. Bio-protocol. Sonicate coverslips in distilled water and ethanol, then incubate in 10% APTES in ethanol for 00:30:00 at room temperature.
Remove coverslips, wash with water, and dry at 50 °C for 00:30:00 .
Place 30 μL gel solution on a clean glass plate and lay the treated coverslip on top. Allow the gel to polymerize for 00:15:00 .
Initiate polymerization by adding 10 μL APS and 1 μL TEMED TEMED Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1610801 .

Prepare the PAA gel solution by mixing 250 μL acrylamide, 10 μL bis-acrylamide N,N’-methylenbisacrylamide Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M1533 , and 729 μL H2O. Degas the solution under vacuum for 00:30:00 .
Wash coverslips with distilled water, dry, and store at 4 °C .
Wash coverslips with ethanol and distilled water, then incubate in 2.5% Glutaraldehyde solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G6257 (CAS: 111-30-8) in PBS for 00:30:00 .
Add 1 mL buffer containing 500 mM sucrose and 25 mM HEPES, pH 7.4, then incubate Overnight to form GUVs.
Place the gel-coated coverslips in 6-well plates and apply 20 μL lipid solution to each gel. Spread evenly and evaporate the solvent under vacuum for 00:40:00 .

Prepare lipid mixtures in chloroform at 1 mg/mL. For POPC-GUVs, use 89.5% POPC 16:0-18:1 PC (POPC) Avanti Polar Lipids, Inc. Catalog #850457 , 10% DOPS 12-dioleoyl-sn-glycero-3-phospho-L-serine (sodium salt) Avanti Polar Lipids, Inc. Catalog #840035 , and 0.5% Rhod-PE Rhod-PE Avanti Polar Lipids, Inc. Catalog #810150 or Cy5-DOPE 18:1 Cy5 PE Avanti Polar Lipids Catalog #810335 . For DOG-GUVs, use 59.5% POPC, 10% DOPS, 30% DOG 18:1 DG (format: Chloroform) Avanti Polar Lipids Catalog #800811C , and 0.5% Rhod-PE or Cy5-DOPE.
Collect GUVs by gentle pipetting and transfer to clean 1.5 mL tubes.
Add 1 μL GUVs to a BSA-passivated 35 mm glass-bottom MatTek dish.
Acquire images using the spinning-disk super-resolution microscope.
Incubate with 4 μL purified protein at 300 nM working concentration, or with cell lysate, for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .
